ddls:
CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for customer login */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the customer */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the customer registered */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the customer's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the customer's account is active */,
  "subscription_plan" TEXT /* Type of subscription plan the customer has */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movies" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the movie */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the movie */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the movie */,
  "director" TEXT /* Director of the movie */,
  "runtime" INTEGER /* Runtime of the movie in minutes */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the movie */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the movie */,
  "poster_url" TEXT /* URL of the movie poster */,
  "trailer_url" TEXT /* URL of the movie trailer */,
  "imdb_id" TEXT /* IMDb ID of the movie */,
  "is_featured" INTEGER /* Indicates if the movie is featured */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movies_director FOREIGN KEY ("director") REFERENCES directors ("director_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movies_genre FOREIGN KEY ("genre") REFERENCES genres ("genre_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who rated the movie */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie being rated */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer (1-5) */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date when the rating was given */,
  "review" TEXT /* Review text provided by the customer */,
  "is_spoiler" INTEGER /* Indicates if the review contains spoilers */,
  "upvotes" INTEGER /* Number of upvotes the rating has received */,
  "downvotes" INTEGER /* Number of downvotes the rating has received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  "parent_genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent genre (if applicable) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the genre is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "directors" (
  "director_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each director */,
  "director_name" TEXT /* Name of the director */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the director */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the director */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the director */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the director is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("director_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer receiving the recommendation */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recommended movie */,
  "recommendation_date" TEXT /* Date when the recommendation was made */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the recommendation */,
  "is_accepted" INTEGER /* Indicates if the customer accepted the recommendation */,
  "acceptance_date" TEXT /* Date when the recommendation was accepted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_profiles" (
  "profile_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer profile */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer owning the profile */,
  "profile_name" TEXT /* Name of the profile */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the profile was created */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography or description of the profile */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the profile picture */,
  "preferred_genres" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of preferred genres */,
  "preferred_directors" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of preferred directors */,
  "favorite_actors" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of favorite actors */,
  "is_private" INTEGER /* Indicates if the profile is private */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("profile_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_profiles_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics entry */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer being tracked */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie being watched */,
  "watch_time" REAL /* Time spent watching the movie */,
  "engagement_score" REAL /* Engagement score of the customer with the movie */,
  "play_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the movie was played */,
  "pause_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the movie was paused */,
  "rewind_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the movie was rewound */,
  "fast_forward_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the movie was fast-forwarded */,
  "like_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the customer liked the movie */,
  "dislike_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the customer disliked the movie */,
  "share_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the movie was shared */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)
